title: Why Saving Feels Like Pain — The $312K Brain Glitch
hook: Your brain literally cannot feel your future self's pain — that one glitch is why 56% of Americans have under $1,000 saved.
angle: Present bias / hyperbolic discounting — behavioral economists proved your brain demands a 157% annual return before it'll choose tomorrow over today
audience: Anyone who knows they should save but can't make themselves actually do it
key_numbers: Your brain requires a 157% return to wait just one year
$312,000 average lifetime cost of present bias
